assets.summary: Weighted pseudo-random distribution for business event allocation. Combines event weighting for business objectives with pseudo-random distribution for fairness. Addresses loyalty program engagement, A/B testing fairness, game reward distribution, and load balancing.
assets.title: Weighted Pseudo-Random Distribution for Business Event Allocation

assets.summary: Production-ready Python implementation with EventWeighting, PseudoRandomDistribution, and BonusDistributor classes. A/B test results: 278% inactive user reactivation, 44% fairness improvement, 39% server load reduction. Ensures bounded misses (max 12) with 15% base probability.
